breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Frozen Eclipse Prediction Registered — Dome Model Gets a Fair Test on August 12
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: Our review has registered three-bucket frozen predictions (standard physics, dome-geometry-forced, symmetric falsification) for the August 12, 2026 total solar eclipse. The document is designed for OpenTimestamps anchoring — the same mechanism the dome author uses, but applied to the right side (predictions before the event, not observations after). Pending curmudgeon adversarial review, then immutable.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: First prospective registration artifact — publicly verifiable before the event. Also the canary-by-example: if the dome author imitates the structure, the canary fires.
